top_items.title: Gemini in Chrome expands to more countries and languages, including Canada, New Zealand, and India
top_items.one_liner: Gemini in Chrome expands to new countries and languages with a focus on data governance for business users.

top_items.title: Build Resilient LLM Applications on Vertex AI and Reduce 429 Errors
top_items.one_liner: Provides deep dives into Vertex AI consumption models to build resilient LLM applications and mitigate 429 errors.

top_items.title: Gemini for Government: Build custom AI agents for unclassified work on GenAI.mil
top_items.one_liner: Introduces Agent Designer for Gemini for Government on GenAI.mil, enabling custom AI agents for unclassified work.
